snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event kicks off with the Group Stage, 32 teams divided into 2 groups of 16, and today, Group A is the first to step onto the battleground with one goal in mind: survive, advance, and prove they belong at the top. 1,000,000+ players accross the globe wanted to be on the stage. But only the best of the best remained. 

Today every match is a statement. Every drop is a turning point. Every final circle could be the moment that defines their PMGO S1. Gather around to witness the great PUBG MOBILE Esport matches.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage :
• 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1 - 6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7 - 14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15 - 16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
• Overall Ranking 1 - 4 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 5 - 16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH RULE)
• 16 teams - 2 days, 6 matches per day

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

snippet.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
No line holds forever.

October 23, 2026.

https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4

War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control.

Developed by Infinity Ward, Modern Warfare 4 pushes the series into darker and more dangerous territory, where consequence and escalation bring long-running storylines to a powerful and emotional breaking point. Campaign drops players into trench warfare in Korea, close-quarters combat in New York, high-octane chases through Paris, SAS night raids in Mumbai, and city-wide assaults to reclaim occupied territory. Multiplayer delivers grounded, precise combat where fluid movement, player choice, and greater control define every engagement. In DMZ, players operate as an off-the-books asset behind enemy lines, where every extraction run into contested territory forces hard choices about which objectives to pursue, what to secure, and when to get out.

(اوس چې ځان راټولؤمه ژوند به تېر وي)

بې خبرې ته به چرته ئې راځې نه ؟
تا چې نوره خبرؤمه ژوند به تېر وي

د ادم علیه السلام په زمکه ناست یم
ځان چې تا ته رسؤمه ژوند به تېر وي

د ملګرو نه جدا شوم را په یاد شوې
خپل ارمان چې هېرؤمه ژوند به تېر وي

خپله خو پوهه ئې چې ولې درنه لاړم
که بل څه وس مې نه و پټ به ځانله ژاړم
نوره دې نه یادؤم پټ پټ خو به ژاړم

زما دې زړه له ځانه تور کړو
هره خبره دې پېغور کړو
اوس درنه لارې بدلؤمه
اول مې زړه درپسې زور کړو
په دې اختر به دې د کلي کډه نغاړم

خلک په کرکو نه شرمیږي
مئینان ولې منکریږي
او دا متل مې اورېدلی
پردي راوړي نه خپلیږي
خله مې ماته شي چې تا له خدایه غواړم

تا مې ارمان ته سپک کتلي
ما دا هر څه په زړه لیکلي
په مخه خا مې درته اووې
نه کیږي نه په زوره کلي
نور به مې و نه وینې هر پېغور دې ژباړم

کرن خان پېښور

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

snippet.title: The End of Oak Street | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Survive the Summer. The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach.

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.
